help.ui_language: Choose the UI language. New languages will be detected automatically from the 'resources/locales' folder.
help.theme: Changes the UI theme. Eventually the look will be controlled by QSS.
help.device: Choose the device for ASR model inference. 'GPU' uses CUDA when available (NVIDIA only).
help.precision_hint: Precision affects performance and memory usage.

precision.auto: Let the app choose the best precision for your device.
precision.float32: Highest quality and compatibility. Recommended on CPU.
precision.float16: Faster and lower VRAM usage on CUDA. May slightly reduce accuracy.
precision.bfloat16: Similar to FP16 but available only on some GPUs. Usually more stable than FP16.

help.tf32: TF32 is a fast matrix mode on newer NVIDIA GPUs (Ampere+). Speeds up work with minimal quality impact.
help.model_name: Choose a local model folder from 'resources/models'. Requires restart to fully reload the pipeline.
help.default_language: Optional transcription language hint (e.g. 'en', 'pl'). Empty = auto detection.
help.chunk_length: Audio chunk length for the pipeline (seconds). Larger values can speed up but increase memory usage.
help.stride_length: Chunk overlap (seconds). Larger stride improves continuity but increases work.
help.low_cpu_mem_usage: Reduces RAM usage while loading the model (recommended).
help.output_format: Controls the file extension and whether timestamps are included.
help.keep_downloaded_files: Keep temporary downloaded files for URL sources. Disable to save disk space.
help.keep_wav_temp: Keep temporary WAV files created during preprocessing (useful for debugging).
help.download_audio_only: When transcribing URLs, download audio-only instead of full video when possible.
help.min_video_height: Downloads: lower resolution limit for video formats.
help.max_video_height: Downloads: upper resolution limit for video formats.
help.retries: How many times to retry failed HTTP requests.
help.concurrent_fragments: Parallel fragment downloads. More can speed up but stress the connection.

license.summary: This program is free software distributed under the GNU General Public License version 3 (GPL-3.0).
license.full_link: You can find the full license text in the LICENSE file included with the app.
